varaamal nirpadhaen thalliye!!

Iravinil ulava vaa
kanavugal malara vaa
vidiyalai unara vaa ne ne ne
imaigalul ulara vaa ..

idaiveli kuraya vaa...

uravinai thodara vaa..
en vaaney ......

Varuven naaney endru irundhidalaama ?
udhadugal kettaal tharubaval naaney
pilai naan thooram endru odhungidalaama?
en imaigalum pesaamal irupadhu veenthaaney

Nilam nee aanaal, nizhal naan aaven
mazhai nee aanal, mayil pola aaven

kanavugal malara vaa
vidiyalai unara vaa ne ne ne
imaigalul ulara vaa ..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Iruvanil Ulavavaa?

The song explores themes of romance and longing, with a soothing melody that evokes deep emotions.

Who are the singers of this song?

Naresh Iyer and Shweta Pandit lend their voices to this beautiful duet.

Who composed the music for David?

The music for the movie David was composed by Prashant Pillai.

What is the release year of the movie David?

The movie David was released in the year 2013.

What emotions does the song convey?

The song conveys emotions of love, longing, and a sense of soothing melancholy.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Iruvanil Ulavavaa from the movie David is a romantic duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Sung by Naresh Iyer and Shweta Pandit, the melody is soothing and melancholic, perfectly complemented by Yugabharathi's poignant lyrics. Prashant Pillai's composition adds a layer of depth, making it a memorable piece that evokes a sense of nostalgia and tranquility. The song fits seamlessly into the film's narrative, enhancing the emotional depth of the characters' journey.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Iruvanil Ulavavaa from the movie David, where Naresh Iyer and Shweta Pandit's soulful voices blend seamlessly with Prashant Pillai's soothing composition. This song captures the essence of romance and longing, beautifully penned by Yugabharathi. Dive into a world of emotions with this captivating duet.
stanzaMeanings: Come, moonlight, why do you stay away from me? Heart, will you give me what I want, or will you take it away?
Why does laughter fade, why do tears mix, why does suffering come?
Come wander in the night, let dreams bloom, let the dawn awaken, come dry your tears.
Come close the distance, come share anything, come continue the bond, my sky.
Can I stay thinking I will come? If lips ask, I will give, but if I am far, should I stay away? My eyes remain silent.
If you are the earth, I will be the shadow. If you are the rain, I will be like a peacock.
Come wander in the night, let dreams bloom, let the dawn awaken, come dry your tears.
